shell.title: Manage your commerce workflow from one place.
shell.description: Secure authentication, inventory, orders, payments and event-driven workflows for a professional commerce platform.

login.description: Enter your account information to continue using CommerceFlow.
login.title: Sign in to your account

register.description: Create an account to manage orders, payments and personal information.
register.passwordHint: Your password must contain at least 10 characters.
register.title: Create your account

validation.displayNameTooShort: Display name must contain at least 2 characters
validation.passwordTooShort: Password must contain at least 10 characters

forbidden.title: You do not have access
forbidden.description: The current account does not have CommerceFlow admin permissions.

products.title: Products
products.description: Manage product information, variants, images and status.
products.newDescription: New products are created as drafts.
products.emptyDescription: Change filters or create the first product.
products.shortDescriptionPlaceholder: Short description shown in product lists
products.versionConflict: This product was changed by another request. Please reload the page.
products.variantSectionDescription: Manage SKU, price, attributes and variant status.
products.archivedVariantNotice: This product is archived. Variants cannot be changed.
products.confirmDeleteVariant: Delete variant "{name}"? This action cannot be undone.
products.noVariantsDescription: A product needs at least one active variant before publishing.
products.deactivateBeforeDeleteTitle: Deactivate the variant before deleting it from a published product
products.variantPriceHint: Prices are stored as integer VND values.
products.skuAlreadyExists: This SKU is already in use.
products.variantConflict: This variant was changed by another request. Please reload the data.
products.archivedVariantError: Variants of archived products cannot be changed.
products.invalidCompareAtPrice: Compare-at price cannot be lower than the sale price.
products.publishedProductRequiresActiveVariant: A published product must keep at least one active variant.
products.activePublishedVariantCannotBeDeleted: Deactivate the variant before deleting it from a published product.
products.variantStatusConflict: Variant status changed. The latest data is being reloaded.
products.imageSectionDescription: Upload, set primary image, update alt text and drag to reorder.
products.archivedImageNotice: This product is archived. Images cannot be changed.
products.noImagesDescription: Upload the first product image. The first image will automatically become primary.
products.imageRequirements: JPEG, PNG or WebP, up to 5 MB
products.imageTypeUnsupported: Only JPEG, PNG and WebP images are supported.
products.imageContentTypeMismatch: File content does not match the declared image type.
products.imageStorageUploadFailed: Unable to upload image to storage.
products.archivedImageError: Images of archived products cannot be changed.
products.imageConcurrentUpdate: The image list was changed by another request. Please reload.
products.productVersionConflictReload: This product was changed by another request. Please reload the data.

productValidation.nameTooShort: Product name must contain at least 2 characters
productValidation.slugInvalid: Slug can only contain lowercase letters, numbers and hyphens

variantValidation.compareAtPriceInteger: Compare-at price must be an integer
variantValidation.skuTooShort: SKU must contain at least 2 characters
variantValidation.skuInvalid: SKU can only contain letters, numbers, dots, underscores and hyphens
variantValidation.attributesTooMany: A maximum of 20 attributes is allowed
variantValidation.compareAtPriceTooLow: Compare-at price cannot be lower than the sale price
